title: CustomerCommitment
description: Schema for tracking and validation of customer-specific contractual commitments, SLAs, and custom feature promises.

customer.description: The name of the customer company.

commitment.description: Detailed description of the contractual or technical commitment (e.g. EU data residency, custom backup).

sourceDocument.description: The document title and section containing this commitment (e.g. MSA Exhibit B, Section 4.2).

owner.description: The internal engineering or operational owner responsible for delivery.

productArea.description: The product or platform module affected by the commitment (e.g. Storage, UI, Auth).

operationalDependency.description: Any technical dependencies required to meet the commitment (e.g. Frankfurt region deployment).

renewalRelevance.description: Whether this commitment is key to customer contract renewal.

reviewDate.description: The deadline/date for checking compliance status (YYYY-MM-DD).

currentStatus.description: The current fulfillment status of the commitment.

requiredAction.description: The specific task required to fulfill or remediate the commitment.
